use clap::Parser;

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long)]
    format: String,
}

fn run(cli: Cli) {
    let output = match cli.format.as_str() {
        "json" => "json output",
        "text" => "text output",
        "csv" => "csv output",
        _ => "unknown format",
    };
    println!("{output}");
}
